Reformat logger error call in development profile to use single-line method invocation style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
logger(joinPoint)
                .error(
                    "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",
                    joinPoint.getSignature().getName(),
                    e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL",
                    e.getMessage(),
                    e
                );
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
logger(joinPoint).error(
                "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",
                joinPoint.getSignature().getName(),
                e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL",
                e.getMessage(),
                e
            );

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat logger error call in production profile to use single-line method invocation style.
Replace explicit Logger type declaration with var to utilize local variable type inference.
Wrap e.getCause() in String.valueOf() to ensure safe string conversion in logging context.
Add a nested Liquibase configuration class to ApplicationProperties to manage async start settings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); ... public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance from private final field to private static final field and rename variable to follow standard naming conventions.
Update logger variable usage to match the new static final field name.
Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable initialization.
Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed in future SLF4J versions; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with modern SLF4J APIs.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
List<Marker> markers = event.getMarkerList();
if ((markers != null && !markers.isEmpty() && markers.get(0).contains(CRLF_SAFE_MARKER)) || isLoggerSafe(event))
